chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 4561 of 2016 Present; Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza For directions For hearing of CMA No.2865/2019 (C/A) 29.01.2026 Mr. Sajjad Muhammad Zangejo, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh O R D E R Muhammad Jaffer Raza, J- The instant Application has been moved under Section 3 and 4 of the Contempt of Court Ordinance, 2003 read with Article 204 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, seeking initiation of contempt proceedings against the alleged contemnors. It is contended that the alleged contemnors have deliberately flouted the orders of this Court dated 06.09.2018, wherein the instant Petition was disposed of with direction that the application of the petitioner shall be heard and decided on the basis of the pronouncement of the Honourable Supreme Court in C.Ps No.482-503-K of 2016. Perusal of the order of the Honourable Supreme Court dated 10.08.2016 reveals that amendments in Rule 10-A and 11-A of Sindh Civil Servants (Appointment, Promotion & Transfer) Rules, 1974 were only to apply prospectively. It is apparent from the perusal of the record that the father of the petitioner expired on 15.08.1998 i.e. prior to the insertion of Rule-11-A and prior to the amendment in those rules. In the light of above, no case for contempt has been made-out, hence the instant application is dismissed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
